plan.goal: Eliminate the current slow compact MCP calls by instrumenting refresh-wrapper latency precisely, adding a true current-state fast path for compact reads, coalescing concurrent refresh work across sessions, and validating the resulting latency reduction against live PRISM MCP traces.
